chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No. D- 366 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 22-12-2022 Mr. Muhammad Rehan Khan Durrani, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for respondent No.4 a/w Ali Gul, Secretary, U.C-35 Council Lal Jurio. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for the respondent No.4 files statement, which is duly signed by the respondent No.4 to the effect that the respondent No.4 shall pay first salary difference installment of Rs. 1,42,258/- to the petitioner on 05.01.2023, second installment of Rs.50,000/- on 06.02.2023 and third installment of Rs.50,000/- on 06.03.2023; copy of the statement is supplied to learned counsel for the petitioner, who being satisfied seeks disposal of the instant petition in the light of aforementioned statement. Accordingly, this petition stands disposed of by directing the respondents to ensure the payment of salary difference to the petitioner in aforementioned three installments without fail. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
